AutoRewritesL0
 
AutoRewritesL1
 
AutoRewritesL2
Level 2 of the auto-rewriter implementing most of the automated rules that where marked as non-implemented in the wiki.
AutoRewritesL3
Level 3 of the auto-rewriter implementing rewriting of membership in a Cartesian product.
AutoRewritesL4
Level 4 of the auto-rewriter implementing rewriting of equality with an empty set.
AutoRewritesL5
Level 5 of the auto-rewriter.

Unit tests for the auto-tactics rmiGoalTac and rmiHypTac.
AutoRmiTacTests.AutoRmiGoalTacTests
 
AutoRmiTacTests.AutoRmiHypTacTests
 
AutoTacticChecker
Allows to check that auto tactics seem to work (see bug #779).
AutoTacticPreference
 
AutoTacticRegistry
Singleton class implementing the auto tactic registry.
AutoTacticRegistryTest
Unit tests for the tactic registry
AutoTactics
This class contains static internal classes that implement automatic tactics.
AutoTactics
This class file contains static classes that extend the autoTactics extension point in the sequent prover
AutoTactics.AbsractLazilyConstrTactic
An abstract class that lazily constructs a tactic and avoids reconstructing it every time it is applied.
AutoTactics.AutoRewriteTac
Tries to simplify all predicates in a sequent using pre-defined simplification rewritings.
AutoTactics.ClarifyGoalTac
Clarifies the goal of the sequent by repeatedly : - splitting conjunctions - simplifying implications and universal quantifiers - discharging sequents with a true goal, a false hypothesis, and where the goal is contained in the hypotheses
AutoTactics.ConjGoalTac
Splits a sequent with a conjunctive goal into multiple subgoals.
AutoTactics.ConjHypTac
Simplifies a sequent containing (selected) conjunctive hypotheses by separating them.
AutoTactics.DisjGoalTac
Replace disjunction occurring at the root of the goal by implication.
AutoTactics.DTDestrWDTac
Discharges any sequent that has the form of the WD of a datatype destructor.
AutoTactics.EqHypTac
Simplifies a sequent by rewriting all selected hypotheses and the goal using a (selected) hypothesis that is an equality between a free variable and an expression that does not contain the free variable.
AutoTactics.EqvRewritesGoalAutoTac
An automatic tactic combining the "RemoveMembership" tactic, and the "Remove Inclusion" tactic to apply on the goal, and looping on all pending nodes.
AutoTactics.EqvRewritesHypAutoTac
An automatic tactic to apply "Remove Equivalence" tactic on hypotheses, and looping on all pending nodes.
AutoTactics.ExistsHypTac
Simplifies a sequent containing (selected) existentially quantified hypotheses by freeing their bound variables.
AutoTactics.FalseHypTac
Discharges any sequent containing a 'false' hypothesis.
AutoTactics.FindContrHypsTac
Discharges a sequent by finding contradictory hypotheses.
AutoTactics.FiniteHypBoundedGoalTac
Discharges a sequent whose goal states that an expression E has a lower or a upper bound (e.g.
AutoTactics.FiniteInclusionAutoTac
Discharges a sequent such as : A⊆B, finite(B) ⊦ finite(A)
AutoTactics.ForallGoalTac
Simplifies any sequent with a universally quantified goal by freeing all its bound variables.
AutoTactics.FunAppInDomGoalAutoTac
 
AutoTactics.FunGoalTac
Discharges a sequent whose goal states that an expression is a function (i.e.
AutoTactics.FunImgInGoalTac
Discharges any sequent whose goal denotes that a functional image belongs to a set when this can be derived from the function properties.
AutoTactics.FunImgSimpTac
Simplifies expressions of form '(A <<| f)(C)' and similar, where f is known as a partial function.
AutoTactics.FunOvrGoalTac
Applies automatically, repeatedly and recursively the FunOvrGoalOnceTac to the proof subtree rooted at the given node.
AutoTactics.FunOvrHypTac
Applies automatically, repeatedly and recursively the FunOvrHypOnceTac to the proof subtree rooted at the given node.
AutoTactics.GenMPTac
Simplifies the visible hypotheses and goal in a sequent by replacing sub-predicates P by ⊤ (or ⊥) if P (or ¬P) appears as hypothesis (global and local).
AutoTactics.GoalDisjInHypTac
Discharges any sequent whose goal is a disjunction and one of whose disjuncts is present in the hypotheses.
AutoTactics.GoalInHypTac
Discharges any sequent whose goal is present in its hypotheses.
AutoTactics.ImpGoalTac
Simplifies any sequent with an implicative goal by adding the left hand side of the implication to the hypotheses and making its right hand side the new goal.
AutoTactics.InDomGoalTac
Discharges any sequent whose goal denotes a membership to a domain the value of which is known.
AutoTactics.LassoTac
The lasso tactic.
AutoTactics.MapOvrGoalAutoTac
Remove mapplet overriding of total function in goal (f<+{x↦y}∈A→B).
AutoTactics.MembershipGoalAutoTac
Auto-tactic to discharge a sequent such as : f(x)∈S, S⊆T ⊦ f(x)∈T
AutoTactics.NNFRewritesAutoTac
Puts the sequents of all pending nodes in Negation Normal Form.
AutoTactics.NotEmptyAutoTac
Replaces a non-empty set hypothesis with an existential.
AutoTactics.OnePointGoalTac
Applies automatically the OnePointGoal tactic to the goal.
AutoTactics.OnePointHypTac
Applies automatically the OnePointHyp tactic to the selected hypotheses.
AutoTactics.PartitionRewriteTac
Simplifies all predicates of the form 'partition(S, ...)' into their expanded form in the goal and all visible hypotheses .
AutoTactics.PPlasoo
Tries to discharge a sequent using PP, using only hypotheses with free identifiers in common with the goal and selected hypotheses.
AutoTactics.PPParameterizer
 
AutoTactics.PPrestricted
Tries to discharge a sequent using PP, using only the selected hypotheses (timeout = .5 seconds) (maxSteps = 2000)
AutoTactics.PPunrestricted
Tries to discharge a sequent using PP, using all visible hypotheses (timeout = 2 seconds) (maxSteps = 3000)
AutoTactics.RmiGoalAutoTac
An automatic tactic combining the "RemoveMembership" tactic, and the "Remove Inclusion" tactic to apply on a goal, and looping on all pending sub-nodes.
AutoTactics.RmiGoalOnceAtRootAutoTac
The automatic "Remove Membership" tactic to be applied once on a goal if the inclusion is at the root of the goal, for determinism.
AutoTactics.RmiHypAutoTac
An automatic tactic combining the "RemoveMembership" tactic, and the "Remove Inclusion" tactic to apply on hypotheses, and looping on all pending nodes.
AutoTactics.ShrinkEnumHypTac
Simplifies (selected) hypotheses of the form 'E={a,b,c}' to 'E={a,c}' after finding the hypothesis 'not(E=b)'.
AutoTactics.ShrinkImpHypTac
Simplifies the (visible) implicative hypotheses in a sequent by removing predicates from their left hand sides that are (selected) hypotheses.
AutoTactics.SplitLeftDisjImpHypTac
Simplifies all (selected) hypotheses of the form 'P \/ Q => R' into multiple implications 'P => R' , 'Q => R'.
AutoTactics.SplitRightConjImpHypTac
Simplifies all (selected) hypotheses of the form 'P => Q /\ R' into multiple implications 'P => Q' , 'P => R'.
AutoTactics.TotalDomToCProdAutoTac
Re-writes a domain if it can be substituted by a cartesian product.
AutoTactics.TrueGoalTac
Discharges any sequent whose goal is 'true'.
AutoTactics.TypeRewriteTac
Tries to simplify predicates related to types using pre-defined simplification rewritings.

Implements the deterministic assignment, where an expression is given for each assigned identifier.
BecomesMemberOf
Implements the set-based assignment, where a set expression is given for the assigned identifier.
BecomesSuchThat
Implements the most general assignment, where a predicate is given on the before and after values of assigned identifiers.

BooleanType

BoundIdentDecl
This class represents a declaration of a bound identifier in a quantified formula.
BoundIdentDeclRemover
A substitution that removes some bound identifier declarations, renumbering the remaining bound identifiers corresponding to kept declaration.
BoundIdentifier
Represents a bound identifier inside an event-B formula.
BoundIdentifierDecomposer
Implements decomposition of bound identifiers of Cartesian product type.
BoundIdentifierShifter
This substitution applies a standard offset to all externally bound identifiers occurring in a formula.
BoundIdentSubstitution
Substitution of some locally bound identifiers by arbitrary expressions.

Contr
Generates a proof rule to contradict the goal and falsify a given hypothesis simultaneously.
Contradict
Provider for the "ct" tactic.
Contradict.ContradictApplication
 
ContradictionFinder
Protocol for finding a hypothesis which is contradicted by some of the others
ContradictionFinder.ContradictionInSequentFinder
Find a hypothesis which is contradicted by the other hypotheses of a sequent (used in the automated tactic).
ContradictionFinder.ContradictionInSetFinder
Find a predicate which is contradicted by the other predicates of a set (used in the reasoner).
ContrHyps
Discharges a sequent that contains a hypothesis and its contradiction.
ContrHypsTests

ContributedItemTypes<T extends IContributedItemType>

Generates a proof rule to contradict the goal and falsify a given hypothesis simultaneously.

ControlMaker

ControlPainter

CursorModifier

Cut
Generates a 'cut' rule, introducing the given predicate as a hypothesis.
CutTests
 
CycleError
 
Data
 
Datatype
Implementation of a complete datatype which references all its extensions (type constructor, value constructors and their destructors).
DatatypeArgument
Internal class used to describe a datatype constructor argument in the context of a datatype builder.
DatatypeBuilder
The datatype builder provides a way to build a new datatype.
DatatypeHelper
This class provides services for building and defining a datatype.
DatatypeLexer
This lexer proxy collapses any stream of tokens that represents a recursive call to a datatype to a single token with the name of the datatype.
DatatypeParser
Parser for IDatatype.
DatatypeRewriter
Rewriter that traverses formulas (see ITypeCheckingRewriter) to translate datatypes into Event-B without datatypes mathematical extensions.
DatatypeTranslation
Implementation for translating Event-B formulas containing datatype extensions to plain set theory.
DatatypeTranslationTests
Acceptance tests for SimpleSequents.translateDatatypes(ISimpleSequent).
DatatypeTranslator
Common implementation of a translator for one datatype instance.
DBUpdater
This class is used by RodinDBManager to update the RodinDB based on some IRodinElementDeltas.
DebugHelpers
 
DebugUtil
Miscellaneous debugging utilities as static methods.
Declaration
 
Declarations
 
DeclarationTests
 
DeclPersistor
 
Decomp2PhaseQuant
Specializes the decomposed quantification.
DecomposedQuant
Implements the decomposed quantification.
Deduction

DefaultApplicationInspector

DefaultFilter
Implementation of a default filter that does not select any sub-formula.
DefaultImageProvider
A default class that implements IImageProvider and always provides the same image descriptor.
DefaultInput
Default master input set to the IManagedForm when creating the master part.
DefaultInspector<F>
Default implementation of a formula inspector that finds nothing.
DefaultNode<T,N extends INode<T,N>>
Default implementation of INode.
DefaultPositionApplicationTests
Tests the default operator position computed by DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication.
DefaultPrettyPrinter
Default implementation of a pretty printer defined for an element contributed as an editorItem and intended to participate to the creation of the HTML pretty print page Intended to be sub-classed by clients, in order to redefine only a subset of the IElementPrettyPrinter methods.
DefaultRewriter
Implementation of a default rewriter that does not perform any rewriting.
DefaultSimpleVisitor
Default class implementing ISimpleVisitor.
DefaultTacticProvider
 
DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPositionApplication
 
DefaultTacticProvider.DefaultPredicateApplication
 
DefaultTypeCheckingRewriter
Default implementation of a type-checking rewriter that does not perform any rewrite by default.
DefaultVisitor
Default visitor that does nothing, while traversing the whole AST.
DefinitionOrigin
Implementation of IOrigin for definition clauses.
DeleteElementsOperation
This operation deletes a collection of elements (and all of their children).
DeleteResourceElementsOperation
This operation deletes a collection of resources and all of their children.

DeltaQueuer
 
DeltaRootAdapter

EqL1

EqualitySimplifier

EqualitySolver

Harvests extensions used in some types.
ExtensionHelper
A class to help building extended formulae.
ExtensionHelper.AlphaPredicateExtension
Implementation of a predicate operator α carrying two children: one predicate, and one expression of an arbitrary type.
ExtensionHelper.GenericOperatorExtension
Implementation of a generic operator with the same type profile as the generic identity operator.

ExtensionKind
 
ExtensionParser
Utility class for parsing the extensions contributed to extension point org.eventb.ui.proofTactics.
ExtensionParserTests

Extensions
This class provides a formula factory to be used for testing extension translations.
Extensions.CProd
An extension representing a Cartesian product, simulating an axiomatic type defined by the Theory plug-in.
Extensions.FSet
An extension representing finite sets, simulating an axiomatic type defined by the Theory plug-in.
Extensions.Real
An extension representing the set of all real numbers, simulating an axiomatic type defined by the Theory plug-in.
Extensions.RealPlus
An extension representing addition on real numbers, simulating an axiomatic operator defined by the Theory plug-in.
Extensions.RealZero
An extension representing the real number zero, simulating an axiomatic atomic operator defined by the Theory plug-in.
ExtensionSignature
A class which allows to uniquely identify an operator occurrence by identifying its arguments and return type.

ExtensionSignature.PredicateExtSignature
 
ExtensionSymbol
Class defining a extension symbol programmatically.
ExtensionSymbol
Deprecated.
This class shall not be used.
ExtensionTranslation

Unit tests for the Finite of domain of a relation reasoner FiniteDom

FiniteFunConvGoal.FiniteFunConvGoalApplication

FiniteInclTacTests
Unit tests for the tactic FiniteInclusion
FiniteInclusionTac
Discharges a sequent such as : A op B, finite(B) ⊦ finite(A) such that A op B entails that A ⊆ B.
FiniteInter
Implementation of the "Finite of inter" reasoners.
FiniteInterGoal
Provider for the "finite of intersection" tactic.
FiniteInterGoal.FiniteInterGoalApplication
 
FiniteInterTests
Unit tests for the Finite of intersection reasoner FiniteInter

FiniteMaxGoal

ForallFollowedApplication
Abstract class for AllmpD and AllmtD applications.
ForallInstantiationGoal
Provider for the "∀ goal (frees)" tactic.
ForallInstantiationGoal.ForallInstantiationGoalApplication
 
ForallInstantiationHyp
Provider for the "∀ hyp (inst)" tactic.
ForallInstantiationHyp.ForallInstantiationHypApplication
 
ForallmpD
Provider for the "Forall Modus Ponens" tactic.
ForallmpD.ForallmpDApplication
 
ForallmtD

ForallmtD.ForallmtDApplication
 
Formula<T extends Formula<T>>
Formula is the abstract base class for all nodes of an event-B formula AST (Abstract Syntax Tree).
FormulaBuilder
Utility methods for building new formulas in the course of the computation of a WD lemma.
FormulaBuilder
Builder class to create formulas in a simpler way than through FormulaFactory.
FormulaChecks
Utility class for ensuring that several conditions are met.
FormulaConstructor
 
FormulaExtensionProviderRegistry
Singleton class implementing the formula extension provider registry.
FormulaExtensionProviderRegistryTest
Unit tests for the formula extension provider registry.
FormulaFactory
This class is the factory class for all the AST nodes of an event-B formula.
FormulaFreeIdentsModule
 
FormulaIndexer
 
FormulaTranslatabilityChecker
Checks that a formula can be translated to some target factory.
FormulaTranslator
Translates a formula to some target factory.
FormulaUnfold
 
ForwardInfHypAction
 
ForwardInfHypsReasoner
Common implementation for reasoners which input is the set of predicates of their first forward inference rule.
ForwardInfHypsReasoner.Input
 
ForwardInfReasoner
Common implementation for reasoners that generate a forward inference with exactly one input hypothesis and mark it as the sole required hypothesis for first forward inference of the sole antecedent of the generated rule.
ForwardInfReasoner.Input
 
FreeIdentifier
This class represents identifiers occurring free in an event-B formula.
FreshInstantiation
Permits to instantiate the bound identifiers of a quantified predicate with fresh free identifiers.
FreshNameSolver
Helper class to compute fresh names.
FunAppInDomGoalAutoTacTests
Unit tests for the auto-tactic FunAppInDomGoalAutoTac
FunAppInDomGoalTac
If the goal is such as f(x)∈dom(g) : First, we try to add hypothesis such as f(x)∈E using the FunImageGoal reasoner. If it succeeds, we try to re-write dom(g) using TotalDomRewrites. Finally, if it succeeds, we try to discharge the goal using MembershipGoal.
FunCompImg
Basic implementation for "function apply to singleton set image" f[{E}]
FunCompImg
Provider for the "fun.
FunCompImg.FunCompImgApplication
 
FunCompImgTests
Unit tests for the Function Composition image reasoner FunCompImg
FunctionalCheck
Framework for checking if a given comprehension set of the form {x · P ∣ E} is a function, based on syntactical properties only.
FunctionalTypeBuilder
A class which allows to build the type of a function or constant that replaces a mathematical extension.
FunImageGoal
Generates a proof rule that adds a hypothesis f(E) ∈ E2 if the sequent contains hypothesis f ∈ E1 op E2 and the goal contains expression f(E) in a WD-strict position.
FunImageGoalAttempt
Common implementation for tactics that saturate hypotheses with tactic FunImageGoal before attempting another set of tactics.
FunImageGoalTests
Unit tests for the Functional image goal reasoner.
FunImgGoalApplier
This class is responsible for saturating the set of hypotheses with all hypotheses of the form "f(x) ∈ S2" that are computed from a given functional hypothesis of the form f ∈ S1 op S2 when the goal contains "f(x)" in a strictly well-defined position.
FunImgInGoalTacTests
 
FunImgSimp
Provider for the "Functional image simplification" tactic.
FunImgSimpImpl
 
FunImgSimplifies
 
FunImgSimpRewriterTests
 
FunInterImg
Basic implementation for Function Converse inference rule f~(f(E))
FunInterImg
Provider for the "fun.
FunInterImg.FunInterImgApplication
 
FunInterImgTests
Unit tests for the Function apply to intersection image reasoner FunInterImg
FunOvr
 
FunOvr

FunOvrGoalTacTests

FunOvrHypTacTests

FunOvrTests

FwdMachineVariantModule
 
GeneralizedModusPonens
Simplifies the visible hypotheses and goal in a sequent by replacing sub-predicates P by ⊤ (or ⊥) if P (or ¬P) appears as hypothesis (global and local).
GeneralizedModusPonensL0Tests
Unit tests for the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonens.
GeneralizedModusPonensL1
Enhancement of the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonens.
GeneralizedModusPonensL1Tests
Unit tests for the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonensL1.
GeneralizedModusPonensL2
Enhancement of the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonens.
GeneralizedModusPonensL2Tests
Unit tests for the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonensL2.
GeneralizedModusPonensL3
Level of the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonens that ignores hidden hypotheses.
GeneralizedModusPonensL3Tests
Unit tests for the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonensL3.
GeneralizedModusPonensL4
Level of the GeneralizedModusPonens that uses variations level 1.
GeneralizedModusPonensL4Tests
Unit tests for the reasoner GeneralizedModusPonensL4.
GeneralizedModusPonensTests
Units tests for reasoners GeneralizedModusPonens.
GeneratedElementsTests
 
Generator
Represents a mechanism that produces new subgoals from a goal.
GeneratorExtractor
Extract useful inclusion predicates from a set of hypotheses.

GenericTest<T extends EventBTest>
 
GenLexer
Generic lexer for any BMath grammar (potentially extended).
GenLexer.LexemReader
Reads a single lexem.
GenLexer.LexState
A restorable snapshot of a lexer state.
GenMPC
Core implementation of the generalized modus ponens reasoner.
GenParser
 
GenParser.OverrideException
 
GenParser.SyntaxError
 
GivenType
Denotes a type defined by the user.
GivenTypeHelper
Utility class for recognizing given types, extracting their identifiers from a type and sort them.
GlobalHypothesesModule
 
GlobalTacticDropdownToolItem
 
GlobalTacticToolItem
 
Goal
Represents a membership predicate that the Membership Goal reasoner try to discharge.
Goal
 
GoalChecker
The GoalChecker checks whether a given predicate is in a reduced form.
GoalPage
 
GoalUtils

Graph

Guard
Implementation of Event-B guards as an extension of the Rodin database.

The image provider for guards.
GuardsPrettyPrinter
 
HandleTests
 
Hashable
Abstract base class for hashable literals.
He
 
He
Provider for the "he (hyp)" tactic.
He.HeAppliction
 
HeL1
Rewrites an equality and hides the hypothesis if the rewritten expression is an identifier.
HeL1Tests
 
HeL2
Rewrites an equality and hides or deselects the hypothesis if the rewritten expression is an identifier.
HeL2Tests
 
HeTests
Unit tests for the He reasoner The He and Eh reasoners share the same implementation.
HideOriginalRewriteReasonerTests
 
HideOriginalRewrites
 
History
 
HistoryAction
Common protocol for classes that manipulate the history within an event-B editor.
HistoryAction.Redo
 
HistoryAction.Undo
 
HistoryActionFactory
 
HTMLPage
 
Hyp
 
HypActionSimplificationTests
 
HypActionTests
Test class for IHypAction implementations.
HyperlinkManager
 
HyperlinkStyledTextTest
 
HypOr
 
HypOrTests
 
HypothesesReasoner
Common implementation for reasoners that take as input a list of hypotheses and mark them as the only needed hypotheses in their generated rule.
HypothesesReasoner.Input
 
HypothesisComposite
 
HypothesisManager
 
HypothesisPage
 
HypothesisReasoner
Common implementation for reasoners that work on at most one hypothesis and mark it as the sole needed hypothesis in their generated rule.
HypothesisReasoner.Input
 
HypothesisSensitivity
Tests about the new Predicate Prover sensitivity about superfluous hypotheses, as exposed in Feature Request #1949927.
HypTests
 
IAbstractEventActionTable
This class provides information on the actions of the abstract event (being refined by some concrete event).
IAbstractEventGuardList
This class provides information on the guards of all abstract event (being refined by some concrete event).
IAbstractEventGuardTable
Common protocol for accessing the guards of an abstract event.
IAbstractEventInfo
This state (sub-) component provides access to information about an abstract event.
IAbstractEventTable
State component for accessing information about events of the abstract machine.
IAbstractMachineInfo
State component providing information about an abstract machine of a machine.
IAccumulator<F>
Common protocol for accumulating findings while inspecting sub-formulas of a formula.
IAccuracyElement
An accuracy element contains a grade of accuracy: it is accurate or not.
IAccuracyInfo
An accuracy info for an element keeps information whether the statically checked element (including its children) is accurate, i.e.
IAction
Common protocol for Event-B actions.
IApplicationProvider
 
IArity
Common protocol for arity.
IAssignmentElement
Common protocol for Event-B elements that contain an assignment.
IAttributeDesc
Common protocol for describing how to render attributes in the Event-B UI.
IAttributedSymbol
Protocol for managing attributes of symbols.
IAttributeLocation
Common protocol for specifying a location which is an attribute of an internal element in the Rodin database.
IAttributeManipulation
Common protocol for manipulating attributes in the Event-B UI.
IAttributeModifier
Common protocol for classes that modify an attribute in a version upgrade.
IAttributeSubstringLocation
Common protocol for specifying a location which is a substring of a string attribute of an internal element in the Rodin database.
IAttributeType
Common protocol for all attribute types contributed by clients.
IAttributeType.Boolean
Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a boolean value.
IAttributeType.Handle
Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a Rodin element handle.
IAttributeType.Integer
Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry an int value.
IAttributeType.Long
Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a long value.
IAttributeType.String
Common protocol for attribute types corresponding to attributes that carry a string value.
IAttributeValue
Common protocol for manipulating attribute values in a generic way.
IAttributeValue.Boolean
Common protocol for boolean attribute values.
IAttributeValue.Handle
Common protocol for handle attribute values.
IAttributeValue.Integer
Common protocol for integer attribute values.
IAttributeValue.Long
Common protocol for long integer attribute values.
IAttributeValue.String
Common protocol for string attribute values.
IAutomaticTool
 
IAutoPostTacticManager
Facade for the management of auto and post tactics.
IAutoTacticPreference
 
IAutoTacticRegistry
Common protocol for accessing the Auto Tactic Registry.
IAxiom
Common protocol for Event-B axioms.
ICacheEnumeration<K,V>
The ICacheEnumeration is used to iterate over both the keys and values in an LRUCache.
ICacheHypothesisPage
 
ICacheListener<T>
Interface for listening to changes in a preference map cache.
ICarrierSet
Common protocol for Event-B carrier sets.
ICombinatorDescriptor
Common protocol for tactic combinator descriptors.
ICombinedTacticDescriptor
Common protocol for combined tactic descriptors.
ICommandApplication
Common protocol for command applications.
ICommentedElement
Common protocol for elements that carry a comment.
ICompatibilityMediator
 
IConcreteEventActionTable
Common protocol for accessing the actions of the concrete event.
IConcreteEventGuardTable
Common protocol for accessing the guards of the concrete event.
IConcreteEventInfo
State component for refinement information associated with events.
IConcreteEventTable
This state component stores a table with information about refinement relationships of concrete events.
IConfidence
Definition and interpretation of confidence of a rule, a proof tree node, or a proof tree.
IConfigurationElement
The contents of Event-B models is interpreted with respect to configurations: a configuration describes a certain composition of modules of the static checker and the proof obligation generator.
IConstant
Common protocol for Event-B constants.
IConstructorArgument
Common protocol for arguments of datatype constructors.
IConstructorBuilder
Common protocol for specifying a value constructor of a datatype.
IConstructorExtension
Common protocol for datatype constructor extensions.
IContext
This is the interface for the builder context.
IContextAccuracyInfo
The accuracy info for the current context.
IContextAxiomTable
Common protocol for accessing all axioms of a context.
IContextHypothesisManager
Common protocol for accessing and managing the hypothesis sets of a context.
IContextLabelSymbolTable
State components for keeping labeled elements of contexts, i.e.
IContextPointerArray
A context pointer array serves to manage references to contexts.
IContextPointerArray.PointerType
The enumerated type PointerType is used determine whether this context pointer array is used with sees clauses in a machine or extends clauses in a context.
IContextRoot
Common protocol for Event-B (unchecked) contexts.
IContextRoot
 
IContextTable
State component that contains the closure of all contexts, extended or seen.
IContributedItemType
Common protocol for Rodin item types (internal element and attribute) contributed through an extension point.
IConvergenceElement
Common protocol for Event-B convergence properties of an event.
IConvergenceElement.Convergence
The enumerated type Convergence specifies the different convergence types of events.
IConvergenceInfo
A convergence info provides information about the convergence of an event.
IConversionResult
Version numbers can be associated with root element types by means of the extension point org.rodinp.core.fileElementVersions.
IConversionResult.IEntry
A conversion converts each file of a project as necessary.
ICoreImplicitChildProvider
Interface used by contributors to define a way to retrieve implicit children of a 'parent' element (i.e.
ICorrespondence
A correspondence relates two arrays and should be used to accelerate search of elements of one array in the other.
IData
 
IDatatype
Common protocol for datatypes.
IDatatypeBuilder
Common protocol for constructing new datatypes.
IDatatypeTranslation
Common protocol for translating Event-B formulas containing datatype extensions to plain set theory.
IDeclaration
Common protocol for indexed element declaration.
Identifier
This is the base class for all identifiers in an event-B formula.
IdentifierAttributeManipulation
 
IdentifierCreatorModule
 
IdentifierDecomposer
New implementation of identifier decomposition implemented as a sequent transformer.
IdentifierDecompositionTests
Ensures that identifier decomposition behaves properly.
IdentifierModule
 
IdentifierPropagator
 
IdentifierSection
 
IdentifierSymbolInfo
 
IdentifierSymbolTable
 
IdentifierSymbolTableTests
Unit tests for IdentifierSymbolTable.
IdentityTactic
A tactic extension to test with.
IdentityTactic.FailTactic
A tactic extension (as an internal class) to test with.
IdentityTranslator
Implements the identity translation Contains the pattern matching part of the identity translation.
IdentityTranslatorBase
Contains the logic of the IdentityTranslator.
IdentListMerger
Stream of identifiers.
IdentsChecker
Checks the identifier caches of formulas.
IdentTable
 
IDependency
 
IDerivedPredicateElement
Common protocol for predicate elements that can be theorems.
IDestructorExtension
Common protocol for datatype destructor extensions.
IDetailsProvider
Provides details concerning an selected element.
IDynamicTacticRef
Common protocol for dynamic tactic references.
IDynTacticProvider
Common protocol for dynamically providing tactics to be used in tactic profiles.
IEditComposite
 
IEditorPagesPreference
 
IEditorPagesRegistry
 
IElementChangedListener
An element changed listener receives notification of changes to Rodin elements maintained by the Rodin database.
IElementComposite
 
IElementDesc
Common protocol for describing how to render elements in the Event-B UI.
IElementDescRegistry
Common protocol for accessing the UI description registry.
IElementManipulation
Common protocol for Rodin elements that support manipulations such as copy, move, rename, and delete.
IElementMovedListener
 
IElementPrettyPrinter
Interface for the extension of the pretty printer, that defines a pretty printer for a given element type, allowing the user to pretty print all elements of that type and append special keywords or details which are not part of the contribution items (e.g.
IElementRelationship
 
IElementType<T extends IRodinElement>
Common protocol for Rodin element types.
IEquivalenceManager
Interface to the equivalence manager.
IEvent
Common protocol for Event-B events.
IEventActionTable
Common protocol for event actions (of abstract and concrete events).
IEventBContentProposalAdapter
Event-B interface for content proposal adapters.
IEventBContentProposalProvider
The interface of Event-B content proposal providers.
IEventBControl
 
IEventBEditor<R extends IInternalElement>
 
IEventBFieldEditor
 
IEventBFormText
 
IEventBInputText
 
IEventBPreference
 
IEventBProject
Common protocol for Event-B projects.
IEventBRoot
Common protocol for Event-B files.
IEventBSharedImages
A registry for common images used by the Event-B User Interface which may be useful to other plug-ins.
IEventHypothesisManager
Common protocol for accessing and managing the hypothesis sets of an event.
IEventLabelSymbolTable
This state component represents a label space for an event to keep, e.g., guard labels and action labels.
IEventWitnessTable
This state component provides information on witnesses associated with refined events.
IExportTable
 
IExpressionElement
Common protocol for Event-B elements that contain an expression.
IExpressionExtension
Common protocol for expression extensions.
IExtendedFormula
Common protocol for extended formulas.
IExtendsContext
Common protocol for an extends clauses of a context.
IExtensionKind
Common protocol for describing the signature of an operator, that is the number of its children and their breakdown between expressions and predicates.
IExtensionTranslation
Common protocol for translating mathematical extensions to function applications.
IExtractor
 
IFactResult
Interface for fact results.
IFilterModule
Basic type for filter modules.
IFormulaExtension
Common protocol for formula extensions.
IFormulaExtensionProvider
Common protocol for providing extensions to the Event-B mathematical language to be used in models and proofs.
IFormulaFilter
Common protocol for formula filters.
IFormulaFilter2
This interface extends IFormulaFilter to add support for predicate variables.
IFormulaInspector<F>
Common protocol for inspecting formulas.
IFormulaRewriter
Common protocol for formula rewriters.
IFormulaRewriter2
This interface extends IFormulaRewriter to add support for predicate variables.
IGeneratedElement
Common protocol for predicate elements that can be generated.
IGenericElementTest<E extends IRodinElement>
 
IGenericPOTest<E extends IInternalElement>
 
IGenericSCTest<E extends IRodinElement,SCE extends IRodinElement>
 
IGoalPage
 
IGrammar
Common protocol for grammars.
IGraph
 
IGraphChangedListener
 
IGuard
Common protocol for Event-B guards.
IHypAction
Interface describing the information stored in a IHypAction object.
IHypAction.IForwardInfHypAction
Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that perform forward inference on the hypotheses in a sequent.
IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction
Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that perform forward inference on some sequent hypotheses, and then hide some of them.
IHypAction.ISelectionHypAction
Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that change the selection information of hypotheses in a sequent.
IHypothesisManager
Hypotheses in a PO file are arranged in a tree structure.
IHypothesisPage
 
IIdentifierElement
Common protocol for elements that contain an Event-B identifier (carrier set, constant or variable).
IIdentifierSymbolInfo
IIdentifierSymbolInfo is a symbol table symbol info for identifiers, i.e.
IIdentifierSymbolTable
State component for identifiers declared in a context or a machine, or in and abstractions and seen contexts.
IImageProvider
An image provider.
IImplicitChildProvider
Interface used by contributors to define a way to retrieve implicit children of an element.
IImplicitProvidingAssociation
 
IIndexDelta
 
IIndexDelta.Kind
 
IIndexer
Interface for Rodin indexers.
IIndexingBridge
Common protocol for reporting the result of indexing a Rodin file.
IIndexingResult
 
IIndexQuery
Common protocol for performing queries to the indexing system.
IInferredTypeEnvironment
Common protocol for inferred type environments.
IInferrer
Base interface for a clause inferrer.
IInjectLog
Common protocol for results of preference map injection.
IInstantiationResult
Interface for instantiation results.
IIntermediateResult
This class is used to represent an intermediate result for the construction of a literal or subformula.
IInternalElement
Common protocol for all internal elements.
IInternalElementType<T extends IInternalElement>
Common protocol for defining and traversing internal element types and attribute types.
IInternalHypAction
 
IInternalLocation
Common protocol for specifying a location in a IInternalElement in the Rodin database.
IInternalProverSequent
 
IInvariant
Common protocol for Event-B invariants.
IKeyboardTranslationTester
Interface for translation testers.
ILabeledElement
Common protocol for elements that carry a label.
ILabelSymbolInfo
Common protocol for labeled elements stored in a label symbol table.
ILabelSymbolTable
Common protocol for symbol tables of labeled elements.
ILanguage
Common protocol for representing a variant of the Event-B mathematical language.
ILAttribute
A representation of the model object 'IL Attribute'.
ILedParser<R>
Led stands for 'left-denoted', in contrast to 'null-denoted' (nud parsers).
ILElement
A representation of the model object 'IL Element'.
ILevelController
Interface for a level controller.
ILexer
 
ILFile
 
ILFileFactory
 
ILUtils
A set of utility methods for 'IL' elements.
IMachineAccuracyInfo
The accuracy info for the current machine.
IMachineHypothesisManager
This is the hypothesis manager associated with Event-B machines.
IMachineInfo
Basic information on the currently treated machine.
IMachineInvariantTable
Common protocol for accessing all invariants of a machine.
IMachineLabelSymbolTable
State component to store label elements of a machine.
IMachineRoot
Common protocol for Event-B (unchecked) machines.
IMachineRoot
 
IMachineVariableTable
Protocol for accessing all variables of a machine.
IMachineVariantInfo
Protocol for accessing the variants of a machine.
ImageHyperlinkMarkerToolTip
 
IMapRefSolver<T>
Common protocol for preference references solvers.
IMarkerDisplay
 
IMarkerRegistry
 
IMarkerUIRegistry
 
IMatchIterable
Interface of a match iterable.
IModule
The core tools, static checker (org.eventb.core.sc) and proof obligation generator (org.eventb.core.pog), are composed of modules (IModule).
IModuleFactory
 
IModuleType<T extends IModule>
 
ImpAnd
Provider for the "⇒ with ∧" tactic.

ImpAndRewriterImpl
Basic automated rewriter for the Event-B sequent prover.
ImpAndRewrites

ImpCase
Generates a proof rule for Case distinction for a given implicative hypothesis.
ImpCaseProvider

ImpCaseProvider.ImpCaseProviderApplication
 
ImpCaseTests
Unit tests for the ImpCase reasoner
ImpE
Generates a proof rule for modus ponens for a given implicative hypothesis.
ImpETests

ImpHypothesisReasoner
Common implementation for reasoners that works on an implicative hypothesis.

ImplicationElimination1

ImplicitChildProviderManager

ImplicitDeltaProcessor
Processes Rodin Database deltas in order to refresh the implicit children for the given root.
ImplicitDeltaRootAdapter
Processes the delta, relatively to the given root which is interested to update its implicit children.
ImplicitDeltaRootAdapterFactory
Factory for ImplicitDeltaRootAdapter
ImplicitElement
A representation of the model object 'Implicit Element'.
ImplicitElementHandlingTests

ImplicitElementImpl

ImplicitHolder

ImplicitProvidingAssociation
 
ImpOr

IntegerLiteral

IntegerType
Denotes the predefined integer type which corresponds to the set of all integers.

IntermediateResult
Implementation of the argument list of a literal predicate.
IntermediateResultList
This class represents an intermediate result for formulas containing more than one literal.
InternalElement

InternalElement
A representation of the model object 'Internal Element'.
InternalElementImpl
An implementation of the model object 'Internal Element'.
InternalElementInfo
 
InternalElementType<T extends IInternalElement>
 
InternalElementTypes
Stores a map between ids and internal element types, as defined by the extension point internalElementTypes.
InternalLocation
 
InternalTestTypes
A class registering dynamic IInternalElementTypes for testing.
IntStack
A stack of non-negative integers.
INudParser<R>
Nud stands for 'null-denoted', in contrast to 'left-denoted' (led parsers).
Invariant

InvariantImageProvider
The image provider for invariants.
InvariantMasterSection
 
InvariantMasterSectionActionGroup
 
InvariantPage
Deprecated.
use EditPage instead.
InvariantsPrettyPrinter
 
IOccurrence
Common protocol for occurrences in indexed files.
IOccurrenceKind
Common protocol for kinds of occurrences found while indexing files.
IOpenable
Common protocol for Rodin elements that must be opened before they can be navigated or modified.
IOperator
Common protocol for operators.
IOperatorGroup
Common protocol for operator groups.
IOperatorInfo<T extends Formula<?>>
 
IOperatorProperties

IOperatorProperties.Notation
 
IOrigin
The interface for the origin of a clause.
IParameter
Common protocol for Event-B event parameters.
IParameterDesc
Common protocol for parameter descriptors.
IParameterDesc.ParameterType
 
IParameterizerDescriptor
Common protocol for parameterizer descriptors.
IParameterSetting
Common protocol for accessing tactic parameters.
IParameterValuation
Common protocol for parameter valuations.
IParamTacticDescriptor
Common protocol for instantiated parameterized tactic descriptors.
IParent
Common protocol for Rodin elements that contain other Rodin elements.
IParsedFormula
Parsed formulas cannot be passed as parameters to filter modules.
IParseResult
Common protocol for reporting results of the AST parser.
IParserPrinter<T>
 
IParserPrinter.SubParseResult<R>
Result of a subparsing.
IPersistor
 
IPOGFilterModule
The filter modules of the proof obligation generator can stop certain proof obligations from being generated.
IPOGHint
Common protocol for hints handled by the proof obligation generator.
IPOGNature
Common protocol for the nature of a Proof Obligation.
IPOGPredicate
Representation of a predicate as handled by the proof obligation generator.
IPOGProcessorModule
The processor modules of the proof obligation generator generate the proof obligations.
IPOGSource
Common protocol for source elements associated with proof obligations.
IPOGState
This class is used to mark components of the proof obligation generator state.
IPOGStateRepository
This class provides access to the proof obligation generator state repository.
IPOHint
A hint for a proof of a proof obligation.
IPOIdentifier
Common protocol for typed identifiers in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
IPOPredicate
Common protocol for predicates in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
IPOPredicateSet
Common protocol for predicate sets in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
IPORoot
Common protocol for Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
IPORoot
 
IPOSelectionHint
A selection hint points a prover at hypotheses that are most likely useful in proving a particular proof obligation.
IPOSequent
Common protocol for proof obligations in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
IPosition
Common protocol for a position in a formula.
IPositionApplication
A tactic application located inside a formula.
IPOSource
Specifies a source element of a proof obligation.
IPOStampedElement
Proof obligation stamps signal changes in PO sequents (i.e.
IPPMonitor
Common protocol for monitoring a Predicate Prover proof.
IPredicateApplication
A tactic application not located inside a formula.
IPredicateElement
Common protocol for Event-B elements that contain a predicate.
IPredicateExtension
Common protocol for predicate extensions.
IPredicateExtension2
Common protocol for predicate extensions.
IPredicateTable<PE extends ISCPredicateElement>
Protocol for accessing a group of predicate elements.
IPrefElementTranslator<U>
This interface is used to translate elements of a complex string preference such as: list elements map elements ... to their object equivalent and vice-versa.
IPreferenceCheckResult
Common protocol for preference check results.
IPrefMapEntry<T>
Interface describing an entry of a preference map.
IPrettyPrintStream
Interface describing the pretty print stream used to render the components in the pretty print view.
IPRExprRef
Common protocol for references to expressions.
IPRHypAction
Common protocol for hypothesis management action in a persisted proof.
IPRIdentifier
Common protocol for typed identifiers in Event-B Proof (PR) files.
IPriorityMediator
 
IProcessorModule
Basic type for processor modules.
IProofAttempt
Common protocol for proof attempts.
IProofCommand
 
IProofComponent
Common protocol for accessing the proofs of an event-B component.
IProofControlPage
 
IProofDependencies
Interface encapsulating information that can be used to decide if a proof is reusable with another sequent.
IProofInformationPage
 
IProofManager
The proof manager is the basis for manipulating event-B proofs.
IProofMonitor
The IProofMonitor interface is implemented by objects that monitor the progress of a proving activity; the methods in this interface are invoked by code that performs the activity.
IProofNodeSelectionListener
Common protocol for classes that react when the selected proof node changes.
IProofPurger
The ProofPurger provides proof purging facilities.
IProofRule
Common protocol for a proof rule for the sequent prover.
IProofRule.IAntecedent
Common protocol for an antecedent for a proof rule.
IProofRuleSelectionListener
Common protocol for classes that react when the selected proof rule changes.
IProofSkeleton
Common protocol for a proof skeleton node.
IProofState
Common protocol for proof states that correspond to proofs of an obligation.
IProofStateDelta
 
IProofStoreCollector
Collects formulae for the proof store
IProofStoreReader
 
IProofTree
Common protocol for a proof tree of the sequent prover.
IProofTreeChangedListener
Common protocol for proof tree change listeners.
IProofTreeDelta
A proof tree delta describes changes in a proof tree between two discrete points in time.
IProofTreeNode
Common protocol for a proof tree node.
IProofTreeNodeFilter
 
IProofTreeUIPage
 
IPropagator
Common protocol for query propagation.
IPropertyParserInfo<T extends Formula<?>>
 
IProverModule
Base interface for a prover module.
IProverSequent
Common protocol for reading Prover Sequents.
IPRPredRef
Common protocol for references to expressions.
IPRProof
Common protocol for Event-B Proof elements stored in the RODIN Database.
IPRProofInfoElement
This interface contains getter and setter methods for internal elements that record and cache proof information.
IPRProofRule
Common protocol for proof rules.
IPRReasoner
Common protocol for reasoners used in a proof.
IPRRoot
Common protocol for Event-B Proof (PR) files.
IPRRuleAntecedent
Common protocol for proof rule antecedents.
IPRStoredExpr
Common protocol for proof expressions.
IPRStoredPred
Common protocol for proof predicates.
IPRStringInput
Common protocol for string input.
IPSRoot
Common protocol for Event-B Proof Status (PS) files.
IPSStatus
Common protocol for Proof Status elements in Event-B Proof Status (PS) files.
IQueryResult
Interface for query results.
IRandomAccessList<T>
An ordered list of objects.
IReasoner
Common protocol for reasoners.
IReasonerDesc
Common protocol for accessing reasoners and their properties.
IReasonerFailure
Common interface for reasoner outputs when the reasoner fails.
IReasonerInput
Common protocol for reasoner inputs.
IReasonerInputReader
Common protocol for deserializing a reasoner input object.
IReasonerInputWriter
Common protocol for serializing a reasoner input object.
IReasonerOutput
Common interface for the output of a reasoner.
IReasonerRegistry
Common protocol for accessing the Reasoner Registry.
IReference
 
IReferenceMaker<T>
Common protocol for reference makers.
IRefinementManager
Published interface for the refinement manager.
IRefinementParticipant
Common protocol for refinement participants.
IRefinesEvent
Common protocol for a refines clause in an event.
IRefinesMachine
Common protocol for a refines clause in a machine.
IRegion
A Rodin database region describes a hierarchical set of elements.
IRepairableInputReasoner
Common protocol for reasoners that are able to repair their broken input.
IREPersistor
 
IReservedNameTable
State component to store reserved names of a component.
IResolver
Interface for resolvers.
IResult
Common protocol for reporting results of AST operations.
IRodinDB
Represents the root Rodin element corresponding to the workspace.
IRodinDBStatus
Represents the outcome of a Rodin database operation.
IRodinDBStatusConstants
Status codes used with Rodin database status objects.
IRodinElement
Common protocol for all elements provided by the Rodin database.
IRodinElementDelta
A Rodin element delta describes changes in Rodin element between two discrete points in time.
IRodinFile
Represents an entire Rodin file.
IRodinHistory
A simplified version of the IOperationHistory dedicated to Rodin edition undoable operations.
IRodinIndex
 
IRodinKeyboardTranslator
 
IRodinLocation
Common protocol for specifying a location in the Rodin database.
IRodinProblem
Common protocol for Rodin problems.
IRodinProject
A Rodin project represents a view of a project resource in terms of Rodin elements.
ISCAction
Common protocol for Event-B checked actions.
ISCAssignmentElement
Common protocol for Event-B SC elements that contain an assignment.
ISCAxiom
Common protocol for Event-B SC axioms.
ISCCarrierSet
Common protocol for carrier sets in Event-B statically checked (SC) contexts.
ISCConstant
Common protocol for constants in Event-B statically checked (SC) contexts.
ISCContext
Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) context files.
ISCContextRoot
Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) context files.
ISCContextRoot
 
ISCEvent
Common protocol for events in Event-B statically checked (SC) files.
ISCExpressionElement
Common protocol for Event-B SC elements that contain an expression.
ISCExtendsContext
Common protocol for an extends clause of a statically checked context.
ISCFilterModule
The processor modules of the static checker are used to accept (or reject) elements of a component.
ISCGuard
Common protocol for Event-B SC guards.
ISCIdentifierElement
Common protocol for Event-B statically checked identifiers.
ISCInternalContext
Common protocol for internal contexts in Event-B statically checked (SC) files.
ISCInvariant
Common protocol for Event-B SC invariants.
ISCMachineRoot
Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) machine files.
ISCMachineRoot
 
ISCParameter
Common protocol for event parameters in Event-B statically checked (SC) machines.
ISCPredicateElement
Common protocol for Event-B SC elements that contain a predicate.
ISCProcessorModule
The processor modules of the static checker generate the statically checked output.
ISCProvableRoot
 
ISCRefinesEvent
Common protocol for a refines clause of an event.
ISCRefinesMachine
Common protocol for a refines clause of a statically checked machine.
ISCSeesContext
Common protocol for a sees clause of a statically checked machine.
ISCState
All static checker state components must inherit from this interface.
ISCStateRepository
The state repository for the static checker.
ISCVariable
Common protocol for variables in Event-B statically checked (SC) machines.
ISCVariant
Common protocol for Event-B SC variants.
ISCWitness
Common protocol for Event-B SC witnesses.
ISealedTypeEnvironment
This type represents a sealed (immutable) type environment.
ISearchHypothesisPage
Common protocol for a page displaying searched hypotheses.
ISectionComposite
 
ISeesContext
Common protocol for a sees clause in a machine.
ISequentTransformer
Common protocol describing a predicate transformer that can be applied to sequents.
ISequentTranslator
Common protocol for translating simple sequents.
ISetInstantiation
Common protocol for obtaining datatype argument sets.
IsFunGoal
A reasoner that generates proof rules that discharge a goal of the form E : T1 -/-> T2 where E is an expression, and T1 and T2 are type expressions.
IsFunGoalTests
Unit tests for the IsFunGoal reasoner
ISimpleSequent
Common protocol for representing a simple sequent, without hypotheses management contrary to the sequent prover.
ISimpleVisitor
Simplified version of the visitor.
ISimpleVisitor2
This interface extends ISimpleVisitor to add support for predicate variables.
ISimplifier
Base interface for a clause simplifier.
ISmartFactory
This interface provides some methods for easily creating optimized predicates and expressions.
ISnapshotable
Common protocol for elements that have two versions: a snapshot and a mutable copy.
ISpecialization
Common protocol for describing a specialization, which groups together type substitutions, free-identifier substitutions, and predicate-variable substitutions in one object.
IState
Common protocol for states store in a state repository (IStateRepository).
IStateRepository<I extends IState>
The state repository allows different modules to share state.
IStateType<T extends IState>
 
IStatusChangedListener
Common protocol for listening to changes of the Event-B editor.
ISymbol
Public interface for keyboard symbols.
ISymbolInfo<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>>
Basic class for symbols to be stored in a symbol table, ISymbolTable.
ISymbolProblem
 
ISymbolRegistry
Public interface to retrieve registered symbols.
ISymbolsProvider
Interface used to contribute programatically the new symbols to the keyboard.
ISymbolsProvider
Deprecated.
This interface shall not be used.
ISymbolTable<E extends IInternalElement,T extends IInternalElementType<? extends E>,I extends ISymbolInfo<E,T>>
Symbol table template used in various forms in the static checker.
ISymbolTableConstants
This interface exports plug-in constants to be used by other plug-ins.
ISymbolWarning
Common protocol for creating a problem marker of severity warning.
ITactic
Interface for tactics on proof trees.
ITacticApplication
Common protocol for providing tactic applications.
ITacticCheckStatus
Common protocol for reporting the result of checking a tactic.
ITacticCombinator
Common protocol for tactic combinators.
ITacticDescriptor
An ITacticDescriptor provides a wrapper around the information contained in a tactic extension.
ITacticDescriptorRef
Common protocol for tactic descriptor references.
ITacticParameterizer
Common protocol for tactic parameterizers.
ITacticProfileCache
Common protocol for tactics profile caches.
ITacticProfileContribution
Common protocol for tactic profiles contributed through extension point org.eventb.core.tacticProfiles.
ITacticProvider
This is the common interface to provide tactics to the proving user interface.
ITacticRunner
Interface for an object that can run some tactics.
ItemDesc
 
ItemRelation
 
ItemRelationParser
Parser for the itemRelations extension point.
ItemRelationParserTests
Unit tests for class ItemRelationParser.
ItemRelations
Manages the relations when element types and attributes are loaded.
IteratorMatchIterable
Match iterable that returns all clauses matching the given predicate from a ResetIterator.
ITestChildElement
 
ITestParentElement
 
IToStringMediator
Common protocol for pretty-printing.
ITraceableElement
Common interface for all traceable elements.
ITracer
A tracer that keeps track of what formulas are needed to get to the proof.
ITrackedPredicate
Common protocol for representing a predicate that belongs to a simple sequent and went through some transformation, while tracking its original form.
ITranslatableReasonerInput
Common protocol for reasoner inputs that support formula factory translation.
ITypeCheckingRewriter
Common protocol for an internal formula rewriter which is also responsible for checking that the resulting formula is type compatible with the original formula.
ITypeCheckMediator
Common protocol for type-checking formula extensions.
ITypeCheckResult
Protocol for the result of type-checking a formula.
ITypeConstructorExtension
Common protocol for datatype type constructor extension.
ITypeDistribution
Common protocol for the definition of type distributions.
ITypedSymbolProblem
 
ITypeEnvironment
Common protocol for accessing type environments.
ITypeEnvironment.IIterator
Protocol for iterating over a type environment.
ITypeEnvironmentBuilder
Common protocol for building type environments.
ITypeInstantiation
Common protocol for obtaining datatype argument types.
ITypeMediator
Common protocol for synthesizing the type of or type-checking formula extensions.
ITypeVisitor
Simple visitor for traversing types.
IUIDynTactic
Common protocol for dynamic tactics provided by IUIDynTacticProvider.
IUIDynTacticProvider
Common protocol for contributors of dynamic global tactics to the prover UI.
IUpgradeResult<T extends Formula<T>>

IUserSupport

Level

LexicalClass

The LRUCache is a hashtable that stores a finite number of elements.

MainParsers
Main parsers implement an algorithm for parsing a formula (or a part of a formula) without being bound to any particular operator.
MainParsers.BecomesEqualToParser
 
MainParsers.BecomesMemberOfParser
 
MainParsers.BecomesSuchThatParser
 
MainParsers.BoundIdentDeclListParser
 
MapletDecomposer
Implement the decomposition of an expression that contains maplet hiding into a new expression without maplet hiding.
MapletDecomposerTests
Unit tests for class MapletDecomposer.
MapOvrGoal
Split goal such as f<+{x↦y}∈Aop1B as follows : x∈A y∈B iff there exists a hypothesis such as f∈Aop2B from which we can infer this : f∈Aop1B ⇒ f∈Aop2B.
MapOvrGoalAutoTacTests
Unit Tests for the auto-tactic MapOvrGoalAutoTac.
MapOvrGoalImpl
Common implementation for MapOvrGoal reasoner and tactic.
MapOvrGoalTac
Split goal such as f<+{x↦y}∈Aop1B as follows : x∈A y∈B iff there exists a hypothesis such as f∈Aop2B from which we can infer this : f∈Aop1B ⇒ f∈Aop2B.
MapOvrGoalTests
Unit tests for the MapOvrGoal reasoner.
MarkerHelper
Helper class for build problem marker management.
MarkerMatcher
Describes an expected Rodin marker in the database.
MarkerRegistry
 
MarkerTests
Tests about Rodin markers.

Matrix

PartialLambdaPatternCheck
Framework for checking if a given expression is similar to a lambda pattern, that is looks like a tree constructed with maplet operators as internal nodes bound identifiers as leaves, which are locally bound and pairwise distinct Here, locally bound means that the de Bruijn index is less than a given constraint.

PrettyPrintAlignments
Enumerations defining horizontal and vertical alignments for pretty printing
Those enums are intended to be used in :
PrettyPrintUtils.getHTMLBeginForCSSClass(String, HorizontalAlignment, VerticalAlignement) and PrettyPrintUtils.getHTMLEndForCSSClass(String, HorizontalAlignment, VerticalAlignement).
PrettyPrintAlignments.HorizontalAlignment
Enumeration for horizontal alignment of text in the pretty printer.
PrettyPrintAlignments.VerticalAlignement
Enumeration for vertical alignment of text in the pretty printer It exists 4 different types of vertical alignments : TOP, MIDDLE, BOTTOM, BASELINE.
PrettyPrintStream
Class used to hold the pretty print stream.
PrettyPrintUtils
Static methods that contributors should use to ease the implementation of their contribution pretty printers.

This class introduces a look-ahead mechanism on top of a regular lexer.
Scanner.ScannerState
 
SCAssignmentElement
Common implementation of Event-B SC elements that contain an assignment, as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCAxiom
Implementation of Event-B SC axioms as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCCarrierSet
Implementation of Event-B SC carrier set as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCConfigManager
 
SCConstant
Implementation of Event-B SC constant as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCContextRoot

SCContextRoot
 
SCContextUtil
This class contains some utility methods for SC contexts.
SCCore
 
SCEvent
Implementation of Event-B SC events as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCExpressionElement
Common implementation of Event-B SC elements that contain an expression, as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCExtendsContext
Implementation of Event-B SC extends clause for a context, as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCFilterModule
Default implementation of a static checker filter module.
SCGuard
Implementation of Event-B SC guards as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCIdentifierElement
Implementation of Event-B SC identifiers as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCInternalContext
Implementation of Event-B internal SC contexts as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCInvariant
Implementation of Event-B SC invariants as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCMachineRoot
Implementation of Event-B (unchecked) contexts as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCMachineRoot
 
SCModule
Default implementation for static checker modules.
SCModuleManager
 
SCParameter
Implementation of Event-B SC parameter as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCPredicateElement
Common implementation of Event-B SC elements that contain a predicate, as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCProcessorModule
Default implementation of a static checker processor module.
SCRefinesEvent
Implementation of Event-B SC refines clauses for events, as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCRefinesMachine
Implementation of Event-B SC refines clause for a machine, as an extension of the Rodin database.
SCSeesContext
Implementation of Event-B SC sees clause for a machine, as an extension of the Rodin database.

SCStateTypeManager
 
SCTool
 
SCUtil
 
SCVariable

SCVariant

SCWitness
Implementation of Event-B SC witnesses as an extension of the Rodin database.
SealedTypeEnvironment
Here we reuse the implementation of type environment, only creating a separate type to guarantee immutability.
SearchBox

SearchHighlighter

SequentDetailsPage
DetailsPage for sequents.
SequentExtensionRemover
Sequent transformer that removes any predicate that cannot be translated to the plain mathematical language, i.e., that contains non WD-strict extensions.
SequentExtensionTranslator
Sequent transformer that translates occurrences of extensions in the predicates of the sequent on which it is applied.
SequentIdentDecomposerTests
Acceptance tests for identifier decomposition at the sequent level.
SequentProver
The main plugin class to be used in the desktop.
SequentSimplifier
Transformer that simplifies a sequent by applying logical simplification rules,
SequentSimplifierTest

SequentTranslator
New implementation of translation implemented as a sequent transformer.

TestEnumDatatypeTranslator
Tests for the enumeration datatype translation.

TestEventBVersion_001_CM

Version 2 of machine database renames event variables into event parameters
TestEventBVersion_003_C
Tests for theorems almost everywhere, i.e., theorems and axioms are kept in one list
